---
title: MapLab
date: '2026-03-24'
description: A Simple GIS Software for Non-GIS Users
categories:
- GIS
- Geospatial
image: featured.webp
image-alt: MapLab interface for basic geospatial analysis and mapping
featured: true
---

[Launch Tool](https://noahweidig.com/maplab){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

An intuitive mapping tool for performing geospatial analysis without GIS expertise. Upload GeoJSON or shapefiles to create interactive maps and explore spatial relationships.
